faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Cedarhurst homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and sewer lines. In Cedarhurst, older plumbing systems, humid bathrooms, and basement drains are common breeding grounds. Our treatment targets both the adult flies and their larvae developing in drain biofilm.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Cedarhurst take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and number of affected drains. We inspect all potential breeding sites, apply targeted bio-enzymatic treatments, and provide follow-up recommendations to prevent recurrence.

faqs.question: Is drain fly treatment safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments use eco-friendly, bio-enzymatic solutions that are safe for families and pets. These products break down organic matter in drains naturally without harsh chemicals, making them ideal for Cedarhurst homes with children and animals.

faqs.question: Will drain flies come back after treatment?
faqs.answer: Our treatment eliminates existing drain fly populations, but prevention is key. We provide detailed maintenance recommendations including regular drain cleaning and proper ventilation. Many Cedarhurst clients opt for our quarterly maintenance plans to ensure long-term protection at discounted rates.
